title: Markets News, June 12, 2026: Indexes Close Higher on SpaceX Debut Day, Finish Up for Week; Oil Falls on Hopes of US-Iran Deal
summary: Markets News, June 12, 2026: Indexes Close Higher on SpaceX Debut Day, Finish Up for Week; Oil Falls on Hopes of US-Iran Deal
extracted_text: S&P 500 closed at 7,431.46 (+0.5%). Dow 51,202.26 (+0.7%). Nasdaq 25,888.84 (+0.3%). SpaceX IPO: $135 IPO price, opened $150, closed above $160 (+19%), $75B raised — largest IPO in history. WTI $84.35 (-3.8%). Brent $87.33 (-3.5%). 10Y ~4.49% +2bps. PPI +1.1% monthly, +6.5% annually — largest yearly increase since Nov 2022. Jobless claims 229,000. 96% probability Fed holds rates steady per CME FedWatch. Incoming Chair Kevin Warsh. Consumer sentiment: net 54% expect unemployment to rise. Adobe -7%. Nvidia telling Chinese customers Vera AI chip could be available in China by August.

title: SpaceX (SPCX) IPO: Live updates — CNBC
extracted_text: IPO Price: $135. Shares: 555,555,555 + 83,333,333 overallotment. Total raised: $75B. Opening trade: $150. Day range: $150-$176.52. Close: ~$161 (+19%). After-hours: $166.85 (+3.67%). Valuation: ~$2.1T at close, intraday high ~$2.21T. Volume: 500M+ shares. 2025 revenue: $18.7B. 2025 net loss: $4.9B. Q1 2026 net loss: $4.28B. Accumulated deficit: $41.3B. Starlink 2025 revenue: $11.39B (61% of total). Starship development: >$15B to date. CFRA: Sell rating, $115 target. Damodaran: fair value ~$1.3T. Musk voting control: 82.4%. Lock-up: 366 days.

title: Oil Just Fell 2% and Gold Is Dropping. Here's Why the Iran Peace Trade Doesn't Tell the Full Story
summary: Oil Just Fell 2% and Gold Is Dropping. Here's Why the Iran Peace Trade Doesn't Tell the Full Story
extracted_text: Brent crude $88.37 down 2.2%. WTI $85.92 down 2%. Energy sector YTD +21.5%. US govt gold book value $42.22/oz (last updated 1973). Gold market price >$3,300/oz — 7,700% gap. Central banks net buyers for 16 consecutive years. Oil: Supply disruption premium from April-May tensions unwinding. Persian Gulf handles ~20% of global oil trade. Iran production capacity 3.5-4 million bpd.

title: 2026 Taxable Fixed Income Mid-Year Outlook
extracted_text: 10-year Treasury yield expected to stay mostly in 4%-4.5% range, risks skewed upside. Core PCE at 3.3% y/y in April (highest since Nov 2023). Fed base case: extended pause, holding policy rate steady through year-end 2026. Market-implied probabilities shifted from nearly three cuts by June 2027 (late Feb) to pricing one hike by May 28. IG corporate bond index average yield >5%. HY share of Ba-rated bonds >55% of index. Favor below-benchmark average duration. Upside risks: sticky inflation, fiscal concerns, rising global bond yields, elevated term premiums.

title: Middle East crisis live: Iran warns of 'imminent' response to Israeli strike on Beirut as ceasefire deal looks shaky
summary: Middle East crisis live: Iran warns of 'imminent' response to Israeli strike on Beirut as ceasefire deal looks shaky
extracted_text: Trump Truth Social: 'This morning's attack on Beirut should not have happened... We are very close to a Deal.' Trump to Axios: 'It shook it up. It delayed the signing by a few hours... Why did Bibi have to do a fucking attack? He has no fucking judgement.' Iran Supreme National Security Council: 'The response of the fighters of Islam is imminent.' US Defense Sec Hegseth on CBS: 'We're already doing things I can't talk about on this program to ensure that safe passage [through Strait of Hormuz] happens as quickly as possible.' Fox News: Trump will ask Iran not to retaliate, expects electronic signing within 2-3 hours. Qatari negotiators fly to Tehran.

title: US and Iran have agreed to wording of a deal to end their war, Pakistan's prime minister says
summary: US and Iran have agreed to wording of a deal to end their war, Pakistan's prime minister says
extracted_text: Pakistan's prime minister says US and Iran agreed to wording of deal. Trump said in Oval Office Thursday deal is close. AP reports both sides confirmed wording agreement.

title: 3 Beaten Down AI Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in June — 24/7 Wall St.
summary: 3 Beaten Down AI Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in June — 24/7 Wall St
extracted_text: NVDA trades 26% below its 52-week high despite 85% YoY revenue growth. AVGO dropped 22% in one week on a sell-the-news overreaction. AVGO's AI guide missed the $17 billion whisper number, though analysts hold a $522 average price target.

title: The 1-Minute Market Report, June 14, 2026
extracted_text: Last week saw significant rotation into small and micro caps, with large caps lagging and the Mag 7+ losing support. Investors shifted toward value over growth for the second consecutive week, favoring smaller, cheaper stocks over the Magnificent Seven. Blockchain, Basic Materials, and Consumer Staples attracted inflows, while commodities and bonds saw outflows amid risk-on sentiment.

title: Euro Technical Forecast: EUR/USD Rebound Hits Pivotal Resistance
summary: Euro Technical Forecast: EUR/USD Rebound Hits Pivotal Resistance
extracted_text: EUR/USD rebound +0.8% from monthly low now testing pivotal resistance at 1.1578/98 (61.8% Fib, May low, Jan close low). Bearish invalidation above 1.1746/75. Close below 1.1483 needed for downtrend resumption. FOMC Wednesday: Warsh's inaugural address, SEP dot plot. Fed Fund Futures: 58% probability of ≥25bp hike by year-end.

title: Credit Spreads — StreetStats (June 11, 2026)
extracted_text: As of June 11, 2026: IG corporate bond yield 5.15%, spread 0.75% over Treasuries. HY corporate bond yield 6.97%, spread 2.78%. HY default rate 2.02%. LPL notes: BBB share of IG universe declined to ~44% (from 52% in 2021). BB share of HY market rose to ~56% (from 46% in 2024). No payment defaults or distressed exchanges in HY in May — first such month since August 2018.
